Imports

dxgicommon, dxgiformat

Types

D3DCOLORVALUE = object
  r*: float32
  g*: float32
  b*: float32
  a*: float32
Source   Edit   
DXGI_GAMMA_CONTROL = object
  Scale*: DXGI_RGB
  Offset*: DXGI_RGB
  GammaCurve*: array[1025, DXGI_RGB]
Source   Edit   
DXGI_GAMMA_CONTROL_CAPABILITIES = object
  ScaleAndOffsetSupported*: int32
  MaxConvertedValue*: float32
  MinConvertedValue*: float32
  NumGammaControlPoints*: uint32
  ControlPointPositions*: array[1025, float32]
Source   Edit   
DXGI_MODE_DESC = object
  Width*: uint32
  Height*: uint32
  RefreshRate*: DXGI_RATIONAL
  Format*: uint32
  ScanlineOrdering*: uint32
  Scaling*: uint32
Source   Edit   
DXGI_RGB = object
  Red*: float32
  Green*: float32
  Blue*: float32
Source   Edit   
DXGI_RGBA = D3DCOLORVALUE
Source   Edit
